name: ofertaforge
description: A bidding, prospecting & negotiation team as 10 agents for solo creatives: prospect -> scope -> market-benchmark -> price (fair floor/target/anchor) -> write the offer (RO/EN) -> negotiate (trade, don't cave) -> close -> upsell -> learn. Multi-currency (RON/EUR/USD), multi-tier (RO/EU/US), with a built-in starter rate card, human gates at scope, price and send, plus a deal ledger that learns across runs.
